headlines.title: A Turquoise Tint for the Black Sea
headlines.summary: Phytoplankton added a milky blue hue to the waters of the Black Sea and nearby waterways in spring and summer 2026.

headlines.title: NASA’s TESS Mission Reveals the “Puffiest” Planets Ever Found
headlines.summary: NASA has revealed two new “super-puff” planets, giant worlds so light that their density is comparable to cotton candy. Scientists calculate that these Jupiter-sized planets are the “puffiest” worlds ever found.
